description: Configuration for a connection to a data source or destination

project.description: CDF project used for the connection.

base-url.description: CDF base URL used for the connection, for example https://api.cognitedata.com or https://az-eastus-1.cognitedata.com

integration.description: Name of the integration to use for remote config and status reporting.

authentication.description: Authentication configuration for the CDF connection.

oneOf.description: Configuration for connecting to CDF using client credentials.
oneOf.title: Client Credentials

type.description: Type of authentication, must be 'client-credentials' for connecting to CDF using client credentials.

scopes.description: Space separated list of scopes to request when obtaining access tokens, for example https://api.cognitedata.com/.default.

token-url.description: Token URL for obtaining access tokens, for example https://login.microsoftonline.com/{tenant-id}/oauth2/v2.0/token

resource.description: Resource identifier passed along with token requests.

audience.description: Audience identifier passed along with token requests.

oneOf.description: Configuration for connecting to CDF using a certificate.
oneOf.title: Client Certificate

type.description: Type of authentication, must be 'client-certificate' for connecting to CDF using a client certificate.

scopes.description: Space separated list of scopes to request when obtaining access tokens, for example https://api.cognitedata.com/.default.

path.description: Path to the client certificate file.

authority-url.description: Authority URL for obtaining access tokens.

password.description: Password for the client certificate, if it is encrypted.

ssl-certificates.description: Configuration for SSL certificates to use for the connection.

verify.description: Whether to verify SSL certificates for the connection.

allow-list.description: List of SSL certificate thumbprints to allow for the connection, even if they are not valid according to the system's certificate store.
